# Prompt Black Magic

> A free, curated library of 944 battle-tested AI prompts across 32 categories. Browse, search, copy, and paste prompts that work with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and any AI model.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/): Browse all 944 prompts with search and category filters
- [About](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/about/): Our mission, methodology, and curation process
- [Blog](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/blog/): 50 articles on prompt engineering, AI tools, and best practices
- [Contact](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/contact/): Get in touch
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/privacy/): How we handle data
- [Terms of Service](https://www.promptblackmagic.com/terms/): Usage terms

## Categories (32)

- Business (134 prompts)
- Social Media (94 prompts)
- Facebook Ads (81 prompts)
- Google Ads (58 prompts)
- Content & SEO (56 prompts)
- Tracking & Pixels (44 prompts)
- Image Generation (44 prompts)
- Resume & Career (39 prompts)
- Coding (38 prompts)
- UI/UX Design (37 prompts)
- Sales (36 prompts)
- Email Marketing (34 prompts)
- Productivity (29 prompts)
- Writing (21 prompts)
- Agentic AI (21 prompts)
- Education (18 prompts)
- Creative (16 prompts)
- Data Analysis (16 prompts)
- HR & People Management (16 prompts)
- Personal Development (13 prompts)
- Legal (12 prompts)
- Branding & Identity (12 prompts)
- E-Commerce (12 prompts)
- Video & Multimedia (12 prompts)
- Personal Finance (10 prompts)
- Real Estate (9 prompts)
- Healthcare (8 prompts)
- Freelancing (6 prompts)
- Project Management (5 prompts)
- Customer Service (5 prompts)
- Health & Fitness (5 prompts)
- Research (3 prompts)

## How It Works

1. Browse or search 944 prompts across 32 categories
2. Find a prompt that fits your use case
3. Copy the prompt and paste it into any AI model
4. Customize the bracketed placeholders for your specific needs
5. Get high-quality AI output instantly

## Key Features

- All prompts are free, no signup required
- Works with any AI model (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
- Each prompt includes usage instructions and pro tips
- Regularly updated with new prompts and categories
